scripts.ready: pnpm run check && vp run -r test && vp run -r build
scripts.check: vp fmt --check apps/*/src packages/*/src packages/*/*/src && vp lint apps/*/src packages/*/src packages/*/*/src --ignore-pattern '**/*.test.ts' --ignore-pattern '**/*.svelte' --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && vp run -r check-types
scripts.ci-check: pnpm run check && vp run -r test
scripts.ci-check-full: pnpm run check && vp run -r test && vp run -r build
scripts.check:fix: vp fmt apps/*/src packages/*/src packages/*/*/src && vp lint --fix apps/*/src packages/*/src packages/*/*/src
